step.title: Load gap analysis and prioritize
step.action: Load gap analysis report and extract all identified coverage gaps.
Prioritize gaps by severity: critical, high, medium, low.

step.title: Write failing tests (TDD red)
step.action: For each critical and high gap, write the failing test first following TDD red phase.
Ensure test names clearly describe the gap being addressed.

step.title: Implement minimal changes (TDD green)
step.action: Implement minimal code changes if needed to make tests pass following TDD green phase.
Keep changes focused — only what is needed for the test to pass.

step.title: Verify gap coverage
step.action: Verify new tests actually cover the identified gaps by running coverage analysis.
Compare before and after coverage for each addressed gap.

step.title: Run full regression suite
step.action: Run full test suite to ensure no regressions were introduced.
Document any test failures and resolve them before proceeding.

step.title: Produce gap fill report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with gap fill results.
